title: zanthoxylum dellomei
intro: Zanthoxylum dellomei, also known as the Chinese prickly ash, is a plant species in the rutaceae family, characterized by its thorny branches and aromatic leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Chinese medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum dellomei include relief from pain, reduced inflammation, and improved digestion, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea, decoction, or powder, and can also be used in combination with other herbs for various health applications.
